medical_history.chief_complaint: right knee pain 8 months after TKA
medical_history.history_of_present_illness: ___ y/o woman presents to the ED with increased pain and swelling of R TKA 8 months post op. Aspiration demonstrated elevated WBC and decision made to proceed with I&D with liner exchange and infectious disease consultation.
medical_history.past_medical_history: - Mycobacterium avium intracellularae - treated for MAC from ___ to ___ - bronchiectasis - Right total knee replacement ___, on coumadin - cholecystitis s/p cholecystectomy - endometrial carcinoma s/p hysterectomy in ___ - Obstructive lung disease (FEV1/FVC 56 IN ___, NOT on home 02 - Anxiety
